title: Intrapartum FHR-UC Phase Coupling Analysis (CTU-UHB) — Analysis Pipeline and Independent Reimplementation
description: Analysis code, independent reimplementation, per-record feature CSV, aggregated results JSON, and figures for the manuscript "Early-labour fetal heart rate–uterine contraction phase coupling is elevated in severe intrapartum acidosis and is modulated by contraction frequency" (Shivhare, 2026). Secondary analysis of the CTU-UHB Intrapartum Cardiotocography Database (n=506). Includes two independent implementations of the full pipeline.
notes: CTU-UHB Intrapartum CTG Database is distributed under Open Data Commons Attribution License v1.0; raw waveforms are not redistributed in this archive. Only derived results, code, and figures are included.
